allowedActiveChanges.name: add-subsystem-lanes-and-ci
allowedActiveChanges.reason: Declarative-first change: proposal/design/specs/tasks authored ahead of implementation per Seam-First Ladder W6 council decision (openspec/council-decisions/2026-07-09-ui-audit-testability-architecture.md). Implementation starts only after the W5 (add-viewport-layout-sweep) implementation merges to main (ladder sequencing); the pack-tagging group additionally gates on the W4 (add-scenario-packs) implementation landing.
